questionHtml: State one greenhouse gas, other than carbon dioxide.
markschemeHtml:
Any one of:
methane, water, nitrous oxide/nitrogen(I) oxide, ozone, CFCs, sulfur hexafluoride  [✔]

 

Note: Accept formulas.

Do not accept “NO2”, “NOx”, “oxides of sulfur”.

meta.title: State one greenhouse gas, other than carbon dioxide.
